---
title: "TCMDATA: Traditional Chinese Medicine Data Analysis and Visualization"
author: "Nan He, Guangchuang Yu, Shuangbin Xu<br>Department of Bioinformatics, School of Basic Medical Sciences, Southern Medical University"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
site: bookdown::bookdown_site
documentclass: book
description: |
  TCMDATA user guide. Covers installation, core features, and common workflows.
link-citations: yes
github-repo: YuLab-SMU/TCMDATA
---

# Preface {-}

Welcome to the **TCMDATA** user guide.

TCMDATA is an integrated R package for TCM pharmacology data retrieval, network analysis, and visualization.
This guide walks you through installation, core functionality, and advanced workflows.

```{r workflow-overview, echo=FALSE, out.width='100%'}
knitr::include_graphics("images/workflow.png")
```

## Installation {-}

Install the development version from GitHub:

```r
# install.packages("devtools")
options(timeout = 600)
devtools::install_github("YuLab-SMU/TCMDATA")
```

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo    = TRUE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  fig.align = "center",
  collapse  = TRUE,
  comment   = "#>"
)
```
